title: Flow 10 Litre Pink Ready To Use Screenwash | All Seasons Formula | Effective down to -5°C | Streak Free Finish (10 Litre)
features: READY TO USE: Pink Screen Wash, is an essential product for maintaining a clear and clean windshield. It is specifically designed to remove dirt, grime, and other debris from the windshield, ensuring optimal visibility while driving.

CRYSTAL CLEAR FINISH: Formulated with a combination of powerful cleaning agents, the Screen Wash effectively cuts through tough stains, insect residue, and road grime, leaving your windshield crystal clear. Its advanced formula is also gentle on the glass, preventing any damage or scratches.

ALL SEASONS EFFECTIVE TO -5°C:This windshield washer fluid is suitable for use in all seasons, providing excellent performance even in extreme weather conditions. It is highly effective in removing ice and frost during winter, ensuring clear visibility while driving in low temperatures. Effective down to -5°C.

REDUCE WEAR ON WIPER BLADES: In addition to its cleaning and de-icing abilities, it also helps to enhance the lifespan of your windshield wipers. By keeping the windshield clean and free from debris, it reduces wear and tear on the wiper blades, leading to improved performance and durability.

UNIVERSAL USE: The Pink Screen Wash is compatible with all types of vehicles, including cars, lorries, motorhomes, and motorcycles. It is a versatile product that can be used on both front and rear windshields, as well as on headlights and other glass surfaces.
description: The Pink Windshield Cleaner Is An Essential Product For Maintaining A Clear And Clean Windshield. It Is Specifically Designed To Remove Dirt, Grime And Other Debris From The Windshield And Ensure Optimal Visibility While Driving. Formulated With A Combination Of Powerful Cleaning Agents, The Windshield Cleaner Effectively Cuts Through Stubborn Stains, Insect Residue And Road Grime, Leaving Your Windshield Crystal Clear. Its Advanced Formula Is Also Gentle On The Glass And Prevents Damage Or Scratches. This Windshield Washer Fluid Is Suitable For Use In All Seasons And Offers Excellent Performance Even In Extreme Weather Conditions. It Is Very Effective In Removing Ice And Frost In Winter, Ensuring Clear Vision While Driving In Low Temperatures. Effective Down To 5°C. In Addition To Its Cleaning And De Icing Capabilities, It Also Helps Extend The Life Of Your Windshield Wipers. By Keeping The Windshield Clean And Free Of Debris, It Reduces Wear On The Wiper Blades, Resulting In Improved Performance And Durability. The Pink Windshield Cleaner Is Compatible With All Types Of Vehicles Including Cars, Trucks, Rvs And Motorcycles. It Is A Versatile Product That Can Be Used On The Front And Rear Windows As Well As On Headlights And Other Glass Surfaces.
